title: Quiz grader output (IFRNLLEI01PRD-749 / G2.P1.1)
description: Constrains gemma3:12b output for scripts/lib/quiz_grader.py. Passed as `format` to Ollama when OLLAMA_USE_GRAMMAR=1; falls back to format=json on error.

score_0_to_1.description: Quality of the answer on a 0-to-1 scale. Mapped to SM-2 quality via round(score*5).

feedback.description: Free-text feedback citing source snippets. Must not invent content.

bloom_demonstrated.description: Highest Bloom's-taxonomy level the answer demonstrates.

clarifying_question.description: If grader_confidence < 0.6, MUST be a non-empty question. Forces the operator to clarify before SM-2/Bloom advance.

grader_confidence.description: Self-reported grader confidence. Below 0.6 freezes mastery progression.
